Wed, Jun 18, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CDT

6:00-6:30 "For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs" + Q&A with Thomas Grabowski, Product Manager, AI

talks.description: The latest tools shipped by dbt Labs, what they unlock, and why they were built the way they were.

events.agenda: 5:30-6:00 Check-in, mingling; 6:00-7:00 Presentation and Q&A; 7:00-8:00 Networking.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Improving, 1515 Central Ave NE Suite 100, Minneapolis, MN
events.raw_text:
Tue, Jul 16, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CDT

Presentation Title: Getting Value dbt Cloud. Covers dbt Explorer, the Semantic Layer, and optimized project structure to bolster project reliability, elevate data quality, and reduce costs.

talks.description: dbt Cloud's advancements in governance, observability, collaboration, and project structure, covering dbt Explorer, the Semantic Layer, and optimized project structure to bolster reliability, data quality, and ROI, including a path toward data mesh architecture.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: In this presentation, we will delve into three key aspects: dbt Explorer, the Semantic Layer, and our optimized project structure. These components facilitate seamless collaboration, whether you're embracing them today or considering a shift towards a data mesh architecture.
talks.title: Getting Value dbt Cloud
